decision.rule: Keep haxe.rust authoritative and generic; codex-hxrust records pressure-test mapping and known-good pins.

actionableMapping.title: Upstream or replace haxe.rust CallStack exceptionToString patch
actionableMapping.rationale: Current codex-hxrust gates need a local workaround, but haxe.rust milestone history says the general compiler/std contract should keep typed Exception formatting.

actionableMapping.title: Make haxe.rust propagate Cargo failure exit status
actionableMapping.rationale: Discovered by codex-hxrust harnesses; create a new generic haxe.rust fixture/task when implementing.

actionableMapping.title: Improve nullable scalar lowering in simple expressions
actionableMapping.rationale: Discovered by codex-hxrust protocol IDs; create a new generic haxe.rust fixture/task when implementing.

actionableMapping.title: Fix generic enum codegen for typed parse results
actionableMapping.rationale: Related to enum codegen milestone history, but current generic payload regression needs a new focused haxe.rust fixture.

actionableMapping.title: Improve enum value borrow ergonomics for helper calls
actionableMapping.rationale: Discovered by codex-hxrust JSON boundary work; create a new generic haxe.rust fixture/task when implementing.
